title: Services & Pricing — Align Studio
description: Reformer classes, private sessions, and workshops at Align Studio Hamilton — timetables, pricing, and FAQs.

content.heading: Classes designed around you
content.subheading: From first steps on the reformer to dynamic flows — find the session that fits your week.

content.heading: What we offer
paragraphs: Every class is taught on professional-grade reformers with props when needed — rings, boxes, and light weights to layer challenge without losing control.

New to pilates? Start with Reformer Fundamentals: four weeks of foundations so you feel confident on the machine. Returning or experienced? Try Open Level or our Strength & Flow sessions for a faster pace.
Private and duet sessions are available by appointment — ideal for rehab goals, pregnancy, or athletes wanting sport-specific work.

tiers.name: Monthly Membership
features: Unlimited group classes for the month

content.heading: Not sure which option suits you?
paragraphs: If you are just beginning your pilates journey, a single session is a wonderful way to experience the reformer and meet our team before committing to anything more. If you already know you want to make mindful movement a regular part of your week, the monthly membership offers the best value — and the consistency that helps you feel real results.

For those who have found their home at Align and want to commit to a lifetime of balanced, mindful movement, our Life Membership is a one-time investment in your long-term wellbeing. Reach out and we will be happy to walk you through what it includes.
We are always happy to chat through what makes sense for your goals and schedule. Just reach out and we will point you in the right direction.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Grip socks are required (we sell them at reception). Wear comfortable leggings or shorts and a top you can move in. Avoid zips or buckles that could catch the equipment.

faqs.question: Do I need experience?
faqs.answer: No — start with Reformer Fundamentals or book a private intro. We will teach you how to set the springs, use the footbar, and move safely before you join mixed classes.

faqs.question: How do I book or cancel?
faqs.answer: Contact us by email or phone to reserve your spot. Cancellations with more than 12 hours' notice can be moved to another date; late cancels may be charged per our membership terms.

content.heading: Questions about the right option for you?
content.subheading: We are happy to recommend a path before you commit.
